name: TX
title: HL7 v2 TX Data Type
description: String data intended for display or printing. Unlike the ST data type, leading whitespace is significant and should be preserved. The TX data type is used for free-text fields where the content is meant for human interpretation. Trailing whitespace may be removed.

element.definition: String data intended for display or printing. Unlike the ST data type, leading whitespace is significant and should be preserved. Used for free-text fields where the content is meant for human interpretation.
